pageContext.name: Escape From Venus
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints and the Frank Frazetta Art Museum present the Escape From Venus Fine Art Print.  Frank Frazetta's unparalleled creative vision has defined popular fantasy, science fiction, and horror artwork for multiple generations. This heart-stopping scene was originally used as the cover of the 1974 reissue of Escape on Venus, a science fiction fantasy novel by Edgar Rice Burroughs. In the vibrant wilderness of an alien world, a woman arms herself in the fight for survival. An extraterrestrial tiger bares its fangs at the knife-wielding warrior, representing just one obstacle in the race to flee from the untamed planet.  Each Escape From Venus Fine Art Print in the limited edition of 300 pieces includes a Certificate of Authenticity and features a hand-stamped, authorized signature of artist Frank Frazetta as well as the official Frazetta Art Museum embossed Seal of Authenticity. A portion of the proceeds from sales of Escape From Venus will directly benefit the Frazetta Art Museum's preservation and exhibition of the artist's essential works. Available unframed and in a custom framed format with a matching double mat design, this sci-fi fantasy artwork is a must-have for Frazetta collectors.  Brave the outer wilds and bring home the Escape From Venus Fine Art Print by Frank Frazetta today.
